sections.paragraph:
ἀγέλη, ης, ἡ (Hom.et al.) herd of swine (Hes. Scutum 168; Eudoxus Rhod. [II b.c.] in Aelian, NA 10, 16) Mt 8:30–32; Mk 5:11, 13; Lk 8:32f.—DELG. M-M.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et et al. = et alii (and others)

Hes Hes , date uncertain, perh. before VI b.c.—List 5

Aelian Aelian , II a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 9
